phases.title: Your idea
phases.subtitle: Write it like you'd tell a human. No formats, no templates.

phases.title: AI writes the script
phases.subtitle: The AI analyzes your prompt and generates a complete script with voices, music, effects and timing.

phases.title: 23+ voices choose their role
phases.subtitle: Real voices automatically selected based on tone and character.

phases.title: Smart timing and mixing
phases.subtitle: Volume, effects, silences and layers adjust automatically for professional sound.

masterDialog.shareAsVideoDesc: MP4 video with cover for social media

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Pay for what you produce. Cancel anytime.
pricing.priceNote: Prices exclude VAT. Paid credits renew monthly.
pricing.bottomCtaTitle: Produce your first audio for free

features: 10 voices in Spanish, Latin and English
27+ voices in Spanish, Latin and English

faqs.a: Each production has a base cost of 10 credits, plus 5 credits per generated voice. A production with 2 voices costs 20 credits, one with 8 voices costs 50. You pay proportionally to what you use.
Unused credits are kept until the end of the billing cycle. They don't roll over to the next month.

faqs.q: What is the advanced voice model?
faqs.a: The free plan uses a fast voice model with good quality. Pro and Studio plans use a more expressive, natural model with support for 70+ languages. The difference is especially noticeable in dialogues and long narrations.
Yes. You can cancel your subscription at any time. You'll keep access until the end of the billed period.

faqs.q: What happens if I run out of credits?
faqs.a: You'll need to wait until your credits renew next month, or upgrade to a higher plan for more credits immediately.

faqs.q: Can I use the audio commercially?
faqs.a: Paid plans include a commercial license. You can use the generated audio in ads, podcasts, YouTube videos, social media and any commercial project.

faqs.q: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.a: We accept credit cards, Apple Pay and Google Pay through Stripe. All transactions are encrypted and secure.

about.rasBio1: Thanks for stopping by. I'm an engineer, content creator, and I've loved photo and video editing ever since I was a kid.
about.rasBio2: I've always been fascinated by how sound transforms any production, but creating it properly was expensive and painfully slow. I've spent 4 years working with AI at major tech companies, so combining skills I came up with the idea of building this platform.
about.rasBio3: It's not perfect, but it sounds a little better every day. If you like it, great. If you find a bug, write me.
about.ctaLine: Your first production is on me.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.controllerText: SonificaLabs is a project by Ras Alungei. You can contact us at info@sonificalabs.com for any questions about your personal data.
privacy.dataCollectedText: When you use SonificaLabs, we collect the following data:
dataItems: Name and email address (via Google OAuth when signing in)
Usage data: productions made, credits consumed, and active plan
Audio files generated by the service
Payment data processed by Stripe (we do not store card numbers)
purposeItems: To provide the audio production service (legal basis: contract performance)
To manage payments and subscriptions via Stripe (legal basis: contract performance)
To comply with tax and legal obligations (legal basis: legal obligation)
To prevent fraud and service abuse (legal basis: legitimate interest)
privacy.thirdParties: Third parties with access to your data
privacy.thirdPartiesText: We share data with the following services, necessary for the platform to function:
thirdPartyItems: Stripe (payment processing — see their privacy policy at stripe.com/privacy)
Anthropic / Claude (AI script generation — receives your prompt text)
ElevenLabs (voice synthesis — receives generated voice text)
privacy.thirdPartiesTransfer: These services may be located outside the EEA (United States). Transfers are covered by the EU-US Data Privacy Framework and/or Standard Contractual Clauses.
retentionItems: Account data: retained while your account is active. Deleted within 30 days after account deletion.
Audio files: retained while your account is active.
Billing data: 5 years after the transaction (Spanish tax obligation).
privacy.rightsText: As an EU user, you have the right to access, rectify, delete, restrict, and port your personal data, as well as to object to its processing. To exercise these rights, email us at info@sonificalabs.com. You can also file a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (aepd.es).
privacy.cookiesText: SonificaLabs only uses a strictly necessary session cookie to keep you signed in. We do not use analytics, advertising, or tracking cookies.
privacy.minorsText: The service is intended for users aged 14 and over. We do not knowingly collect data from anyone under that age.
privacy.changesText: If we modify this policy, we will publish the updated version on this page. For significant changes, we will notify you by email.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.legalNoticeText: SonificaLabs is a project by Ras Alungei, based in Spain. Contact: info@sonificalabs.com.
terms.serviceText: SonificaLabs is an AI-powered audio production platform. Users enter a text description and the system automatically generates audio with voices, music, sound effects, and mixing.
accountItems: You need to create an account via Google OAuth to use the service.
You are responsible for the activity on your account.
We reserve the right to suspend or delete accounts that violate these terms.
pricingItems: Prices are displayed in euros and exclude VAT unless stated otherwise.
Payments are processed through Stripe. SonificaLabs does not store card data.
Subscriptions renew automatically each month. Unused credits do not roll over between cycles.
You can cancel your subscription at any time from your account. You will keep access until the end of the billed period.
No refunds are given for partial periods, except as required by applicable law.
terms.withdrawalText: By starting an audio production, you agree that the service begins immediately and you waive the 14-day right of withdrawal for that specific production, in accordance with EU consumer protection law.
ipItems: The platform, its code, design, and brand are owned by SonificaLabs.
Regarding generated audio: we grant you a broad usage license (including commercial use on paid plans). SonificaLabs does not claim rights over your productions.
terms.aiText: Audio is generated using artificial intelligence (Anthropic Claude for scripts, ElevenLabs for voices). Results are not guaranteed in terms of accuracy, originality, or suitability. You are responsible for reviewing the content before publishing it.
acceptableItems: Do not generate illegal, defamatory, or hate-inciting content.
Do not attempt to extract, resell, or redistribute the service.
Do not abuse the credit system or create multiple accounts to obtain free credits.
terms.availabilityText: SonificaLabs is provided 'as is'. We do not guarantee uninterrupted availability. We may modify or discontinue features with reasonable notice.
terms.liabilityText: SonificaLabs shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from use of the service. Our maximum liability is limited to the amount paid by the user in the last 12 months. This limitation does not apply in cases of willful misconduct or gross negligence.
terms.lawText: These terms are governed by Spanish law. Any disputes shall be resolved by the courts of the user's domicile if the user is a consumer, or by the courts of Spain otherwise.
terms.changesText: We may update these terms. We will publish changes on this page and, for significant changes, notify you by email. Continued use of the service after notification constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
